column1: 趣味ならまだしも、仕事でそれは許されない。
column2: しゅみならまだしも、しごとでそれはゆるされない。
column3: As a hobby that might be fine, but professionally that is not acceptable.
column4: ならまだしも (if it were ~, that might be okay, but ~ is another matter)
column5: Noun + ならまだしも + [unacceptable case]
column6: concedes an acceptable case, then contrasts it with the actual unacceptable situation
column8: ならまだしも = acceptable case conceded before unacceptable; ならともかく = same nuance (slightly more formal); はともかく = setting aside; にしても = even if
